title: Walmart India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Walmart India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Walmart India in Chandigarh is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Walmart India:
Walmart India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Walmart India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
